projectDescription: FastAPI service for semantic product search using RAG, vector embeddings, and multi-LLM failover
keyFeatures: Semantic search using Google Gemini embeddings and pgvector
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pattern for accurate product recommendations
PostgreSQL with pgvector extension for vector similarity search
publicApiSurface: POST /auth/login - Authenticate and get JWT token
POST /products/ - Create product with automatic embedding generation
POST /products/search - Semantic search with AI recommendations
LLMService.generate_answer(query, context) - Generate AI responses with failover
ProductService.create_product(db, product_in) - Create product with embedding
ProductService.search_products(db, query, limit) - Vector similarity search
